questions.question: Find out the Normality of a solution, when 9.8 gms. of $\text{H}_2\text{SO}_4$ is dissolved in 500 ml solution.
How many grams of $\text{NaOH}$ will be required to prepare $500 \text{ gram}$ solution containing $10\% \text{ w/w NaOH}$ solution ?

How many grams of Sulphuric acid is to be dissolved to prepare $200\text{ ml.}$ aqueous solution having concentration of $[\text{H}_3\text{O}^+]$ ions $1\text{ M}$ at $25^{\circ}\text{C}$ temperature. [H=1, O=16, S=32 gram . mole$^{-1}$ ]
What is the normality of aqueous solution of $\text{H}_2\text{SO}_4$ having $\text{pH} = 1$.
$1\text{ mole}$ of metal ‘M’ reacts completely with alcohol to give $1.5\text{ moles}$ of $\text{H}_2$. Then what will be the valency of metal ‘M’?
